name: BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - BTF Finacimiento Garantias Inmov Fund
summary: BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - BTF Finacimiento Garantias Inmov Fund is an investment fund providing financing with real estate guarantees. It is managed by BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos and aims to generate returns through financing secured by real estate assets.
